video.title: Capture screenshots of any website using Scrapfly's Screenshot API - Introduction
video.shortDescription:
introduction to Scrapfly's Screenshot API for capturing screenshots of websites on demand for data analysis and event tracking. See https://github.com/scrapfly/screenshot-scraping-demo for notebook source code of examples used in this video.

Sections:
00:00 introduction
00:21 setup 
01:00 Basic use
01:26 Capture parameter
01:42 Resolution parameter
02:10 Capture areas
02:40 Javascript execution
03:08 Auto_scroll parameter
03:25 Options parameter
03:35 Block Banners
03:46 Dark mode option
04:00 Cache parameter
04:20 Web Player & Outro
